description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a dark green metallic back and a prominent triple-lens camera array in the upper left corner. The back surface is smooth and reflective, with a centered, glossy Apple logo. The front is dominated by a large, edge-to-edge black glass display, which appears to be turned off or showing a dark, abstract wallpaper. The sides are thin and metallic, with visible physical buttons for volume and power, and a slight camera bump on the back. The overall design is minimalist and premium, typical of high-end mobile devices, and the object is compact enough to be easily held in one hand.
description: A sleek, dark green smartphone with a triple-lens camera on the back, a large black glass display, and metallic sides with physical buttons.
description_view_0: The back view shows a dark green metallic surface with a triple-lens camera array in the upper left and a centered Apple logo.
description_view_1: The left edge view reveals the slim profile and the placement of physical buttons along the side.
description_view_2: The front view displays the large, black glass screen with minimal bezels and no visible buttons.
description_view_3: The right edge view highlights the thinness of the device and the slight protrusion of the camera bump.
attribute_brand_logo: A glossy silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a dark, abstract wallpaper with greenish hues and no visible icons or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a triple camera array located in the upper left corner on the back, arranged in a triangular pattern with a slight camera bump.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are present on the left edge, likely for volume control and mute switch, with a possible power button on the right edge.
